name: DNSCache
summary: The DNSCache collector shows DNS information about device local cache.

fields.name: ipaddress
fields.description: The IP address of the host.

examples.title: Example: Show DNS information for host "ping.alot.com"
Which entries are for a domain hostname - single
examples.v2_query:
DnsCache hostname, ipaddress
        WHERE DnsCacache hostname equals "foo.com"

examples.title: Which entries are for a domain hostname - many
examples.v2_query:
DnsCache hostname, ipaddress
        WHERE DnsCacache hostname equals "foo.com"
            OR DnsCache hostname equals "bar.com"
            OR DnsCache hostname equals "baz.com"

examples.title: Which entries are for a domain IP - single
examples.v2_query:
DnsCache hostname, ipaddress
        WHERE DnsCacache hostname equals "1.1.1.1"

examples.title: Which entries are for a domain IP - many
examples.v2_query:
DnsCache hostname, ipaddress
        WHERE DnsCacache hostname equals "1.1.1.1"
            OR DnsCache hostname equals "2.2.2.2"
            OR DnsCache hostname equals "3.3.3.3"
